intel.title: [CISA KEV] SimpleHelp  SimpleHelp - SimpleHelp Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-48558
廠商: SimpleHelp 
產品: SimpleHelp
漏洞名稱: SimpleHelp Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
說明: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without verifying their cryptographic signature. In a vulnerable configuration, a remote, unauthenticated attacker can submit a forged token containing arbitrary identity claims to obtain a fully authenticated technician session. In some configurations, this may also allow bypass of multi-factor authentication.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-02
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: 遠端支援軟體 SimpleHelp 存在 OIDC 驗證繞過漏洞（CVE-2026-48558），遠端且未授權的攻擊者可透過偽造的權杖獲取完整的技術人員會話權限。此漏洞已被收錄於 CISA KEV 且存在被積極利用的風險，但由於本公司並未使用該軟體，故無直接影響。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] PTC Windchill and FlexPLM - PTC Windchill and FlexPLM Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-12569
廠商: PTC
產品: Windchill and FlexPLM
漏洞名稱: PTC Windchill and FlexPLM Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
說明: PTC Windchill and FlexPLM contains an improper input validation vulnerability allowing an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending a malicious request to the network.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-28
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: CISA KEV 新增 PTC Windchill 與 FlexPLM 的輸入驗證漏洞（CVE-2026-12569），該漏洞允許未經授權的遠端攻擊者執行任意程式碼。經評估，本公司並未部署或使用此類 PTC 產品，因此不受此漏洞影響。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Cisco Unified Communications Manager - Cisco Unified Communications Manager Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-20230
廠商: Cisco
產品: Unified Communications Manager
漏洞名稱: Cisco Unified Communications Manager Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability
說明: Cisco Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) and Cisco Unified Communications Manager Session Management Edition (Unified CM SME) contain a server-side request forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to write files to the underlying operating system that could be used later to elevate to root.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-28
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Cisco Unified Communications Manager 存在伺服器端請求偽造（SSRF）漏洞（CVE-2026-20230），已被 CISA 列入已知遭利用漏洞清單（KEV）。遠端且未經授權的攻擊者可利用此漏洞在底層作業系統寫入檔案，進而提升至 root 權限控制系統。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Lantronix EDS5000 - Lantronix EDS5000 Code Injection Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2025-67038
廠商: Lantronix
產品: EDS5000
漏洞名稱: Lantronix EDS5000 Code Injection Vulnerability
說明: Lantronix EDS5000 contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to inject arbitrary OS commands into the username parameter. Injected commands are executed with root privileges.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-26
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Lantronix EDS5000 設備存在命令注入漏洞（CVE-2025-67038），攻擊者可透過 username 參數注入任意作業系統命令，並以 root 權限執行。此漏洞已被收錄於 CISA KEV，顯示已有在野利用，具備極高危害性。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Ubiquiti UniFi OS - Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-34910
廠商: Ubiquiti
產品: UniFi OS
漏洞名稱: Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
說明: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains an improper input validation vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to conduct command injection.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-26
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Ubiquiti UniFi OS 存在輸入驗證不當漏洞（CVE-2026-34910），允許具備網路存取權限的攻擊者執行命令注入。此漏洞已被 CISA 列入 KEV 確信已被活躍利用，由於公司內部正使用 UniFi UDM-SE 控制器及多台無線 AP，面臨直接的安全威脅。
analysis.recommendation:
1. 立即針對公司內運行的「Unifi AP Controller主機(UDM)-unifi SE」及相關 UniFi 設備進行盤點。
2. 依據 Ubiquiti 官方安全公告（Security-Advisory-Bulletin-064-064），將 UniFi OS 升級至最新安全修補版本。
3. 嚴格限制 UniFi 管理介面的存取來源 IP，避免將管理後台暴露於未授權的網路環境中。
affected_assets: 資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 7 Pro
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 7 Pro MAX
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 6 Pro (含POE供應器)
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi AC-Lite
